title: Sanitary entry station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''sanitary entry station''' was a method of personal sanitation used by the [[Yevetha]] onboard their [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. One would enter an airtight hatch which, once sealed, would fill with yellow gas; afterward everything would be washed down by a hot liquid spray.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''

[[Category:Hygiene]]
